backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the ICP backend that manages solar leads and user profiles, with admin-gated CRUD operations for leads and user-gated profile management, using AccessControl, blob storage, and authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking two implemented features—updating BankFinanceBanner financing terms (90%/10%) and replacing the Hero background image—to their affected files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary document describing the purpose and key changes of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, charts, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'TRI-GITA SERVICES' and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the entire page in LanguageProvider and composes all section components (Header, Hero, SchemeInfo, etc.) in order.
frontend/src/components/BankFinanceBanne: Dark navy banner section displaying bank financing stats (90% loan, 10% customer payment, 7-year tenure) sourced from translations, with a WhatsApp CTA button.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: Fixed floating WhatsApp button component with a pulse animation, hover tooltip using the correct translation key, and a link to the business WhatsApp number.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Two-column footer with navy background displaying brand info, a WhatsApp link, and contact details (phones, email, address, service area) sourced from translations.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with scroll-aware styling, smooth-scroll nav links, a language switcher (EN/HI/OD), and a WhatsApp CTA button, plus a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a temple background image, headline, WhatsApp and scheme CTA buttons, and three trust-stat cards (speed, cost, shield).
frontend/src/components/InquiryForm.tsx: Lead capture form with fields for name, phone, email, city, and system size; validates input, submits via a React Query mutation, then opens a pre-filled WhatsApp message on success.
frontend/src/components/OdishaGuide.tsx: Section displaying Odisha-specific solar subsidy tiers (1kW, 2kW, 3kW) with central and state subsidy breakdowns, revealed via an IntersectionObserver animation.
frontend/src/components/SchemeInfo.tsx: Informational section about the government solar scheme, listing benefits, eligibility criteria, and a four-step installation process with icons and numbered cards.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Two-column services section showcasing residential and commercial solar offerings, each with an image, feature checklist, and a CTA button that scrolls to the inquiry form.
frontend/src/components/WarrantyGuarante: Renders a three-card warranty section with navy/gold/teal accent styles, displaying years, title, and description for each warranty tier using i18n translations.
Displays a styled CTA section with a WhatsApp link, phone number, and decorative elements, directing users to contact via WhatsApp using a hardcoded number.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: Renders a three-card 'Why Choose Us' section with navy/gold/teal accents, icons, and translated titles/descriptions highlighting company advantages.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for managing the active language ('en', 'hi', 'od'), persisting the selection to localStorage and restoring it on mount.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor via React Query, using the current Internet Identity for authenticated calls and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication hook and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useSubmitLead mutation hook that submits lead form data to the ICP backend actor and invalidates the 'leads' query cache on success.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Defines multilingual translation strings (English, Hindi, Odia) for all UI sections including header, hero, scheme info, services, and warranty content.
frontend/src/i18n/useTranslation.ts: Hook that returns the translation object for the currently active language by reading from LanguageContext and indexing into the translations map.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Outfit, Playfair Display), sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using oklch colors, and declares keyframe animations (shimmer, pulse-ring, fade-in-up, accordion).
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to extract URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL bar without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom navy/gold/teal color palettes using oklch, custom fonts (Outfit, Playfair Display), box shadows, border radii, and keyframe animations matching those in index.css.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file describing a real estate project (TRI-GITA SERVICES) with existing features for updating BankFinanceBanner financing terms (90% bank loan / 10% customer) and replacing the hero background with a Samaleswari Temple image, plus two pending new feature requests for the same.
